Squad Ring [Quest Version]  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: FINGER
Charges: 1
Effect: Healing (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Squad Ring [Quest Version]
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
Slot: FINGER
Charges: 1
Effect: Healing (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:Wall Squad Ring
Item Type:Jewelry
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 01:45:02
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 10
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Wall Squad Ring
Item Lore: Wall Squad Ring

Can be recharged by an NPC cleric in Rivervale.



Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction

26 posts
Ok for a level 10 SK can anyone give an estimate of how many combination of gobbies and orcs it would take to kill to keep the guards from trying to kill me? Would like to get to indifferent so that if I kill one to get this I wouldn't automatically go back to threatenly. Any idea?

this would be really nice if it wasnt only 1 charge or if it wasnt loor lol.... id get like 90 of them and do some soloing wiht my rogue

Ring
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2002 at 9:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362214564
18 posts
The loot ring has like 5 charisma, i think. Lore item. Every RV guard ive looted had 1. Also a spear and a shield.
▲ Page top
RE: Ring
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2002 at 11:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765551296
Scholar
180 posts
There are 2 versions of the squad ring. The lootable version, like you said, does drop from Rivervale guards, the burglar looking guys that KS the newbies all the time. The ring showed at the top of the page is actually the quested version. It's obtained via a quest in Rivervale that involves a lot of faction work. My halfling cleric spent levels 6-12 killing goblins and orcs to get enough faction to get this item.
▲ Page top
RE: Ring
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2002 at 9:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255792619
5 posts
Just so you know, I did this quest by doing the bandage quest in Misty. It took me 63 stacks of bandages to get from amiable to ally, ran to the NPC, and said " Am I one with the wall?" I got the ring and faction with them dropped to amiable. No killin, but it cost me about 80pp in bandages. Maerchants are still ally too.

Marakannessa
51 Ranger
Bristlebane
▲ Page top
Ring
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2002 at 4:38 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591767498933
6 posts
I have this ring on both my cleric and my druid.
It has 1 charge, and can be recharged by giving the ring to Hendi Mrubble in the cleric guild in RV - she will hand it back recharged.

Thats it.
▲ Page top

__DEL__1592758721612
Scholar
32 posts
How do you get this thing to cast? I have tried to target myself and other PCs but no variation of left or right click would cast this thing!

#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 21 2001 at 9:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hi for you all eq expert out there, i was thinking to start a Bar War, could any one give me a suggestions how do I distribut the bouns points? add to Strength, Dex, or AGI?

# Sep 02 2002 at 9:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758078227
12 posts
What does that have to do with the item at the top of the page? Don't do that. YOu're not going to get alot of help unles you post it on a Warior or Barbarian spacific site. Please think befor you take your next breath. It could go to someone more worthy ;)
▲ Page top
Lord of the Squad Rings
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2001 at 2:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760505052
21 posts
I got the squad ring when i was level 12. When i tryed to get a second one from him after raising faction for it again, i realized it was lore, thus lowering my faction a second time. just MINUTES after that i was doing a bit of smithing in the forge across town when i was rearraging things in my inventory. i moved the ring into the forge while i got organized, and then it wouldnt let me take it back out. i called the gm, and he wanted to see if he could remove it, but when he opened the forge it was gone, and i had to raise my faction a 3rd time. i finally got it again, thank god. so just remember, DONT SET YOUR SQUAD RING IN THE FORGE!!
▲ Page top
Answers...
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2001 at 4:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248576252
Sage
178 posts
The ring can be triggered from inventory, it does not have to be worn.

Doing the quest and getting the ring causes a huge faction drop, meaning that you cannot immediately get another ring. You can work your faction back up to get another ring.

The ring has a single charge of healing. Once that charge is used, it is gone. You need to do the quest to recharge the ring, or destroy it and get another one at the point.
▲ Page top
ummm
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2001 at 9:33 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
ummm, y do they sell a recharge when most likely you can destroy it or sell it or somethin and get another one.... wouldn't ur faction stay the same?
▲ Page top
RE: ummm
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2001 at 9:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757464810
156 posts
When you actually get the item from having good enough faction, your faction with the Warriors of the Vale (Rivervale Warriors Guild and deputies) actually DECREASES to where you can't just get another one. You'd have to build your faction up again.

Verant decided that people destroying the ring and just getting another one instead of recharging it was an exploit that they had to fix so they spent time to change it to where you lose faction when you finish the quest instead of actually spending that time fixing other broken quests or items.
▲ Page top
Questions
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2001 at 10:31 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just got mine yesterday, WOOT! Anyway, I had ally faction, but he still wouldn't give it to me...someone said got get more beads to turn in. So I got about 20 more, and turned them in 4 at a time to Sheriff Roglio at the top of the bank. Then I got my ring from Ghobber.

I have some questions tho:
What faction do i need with Rivervale clerics...I have amiable.

Will it cast if I am not wearing it?

# Jul 24 2001 at 10:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965890681
14 posts
My druid has both Quest and Loot versions of the ring. I have not actually tried to equip both at the same time, since the Quest version can be triggered from the inventory, but I assume that you can equip both at once if you want to.

Is this true?
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 4:17 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The picture of the item looks fake. The ring picture is in the bottom right corner instead of the top and Lore Item is ()s. Just curious before I waste time building up faction.
▲ Page top
RE: Is this true?
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 8:09 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yes, it's just a very old picture -- format has changed on several things
▲ Page top
RE: Is this true?
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2001 at 11:27 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yes, this is true, although you may think it isn't after you have worked on this a while. It takes a long time to kill all the goblins, orcs and incarnations of Mooto and turning in the appropriate bounty item to get enough of a reputation to get the ring. But, it casts on the run, I have never had it interrupted and has saved my life more than once.
▲ Page top

RE: Faction for Recharge

# Jun 07 2001 at 8:45 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Cleric faction. There is a quest with honeycomb from bixies tha is the only way I know to raise it.
▲ Page top
Sure, why not...
QuoteReply
# Dec 26 2000 at 3:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752337794
8 posts
Worth keeping around if you are hunting in Highpass or Kithicor. Just incase of emergencies. Although 80HP Isn't alot, it may be just what you need to save yourself. You can also get your factions up with GuardiansOfTheVale by killing bixies. Bixies drop honeycombs, which you see alot of chanter's buying, usually for about 1pp for the Stein of Moggok Quest. So make a few plat and get a lifesaver, what more could you ask for? hehe...
▲ Page top
RE: Sure, why not...
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2001 at 6:02 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
You have to do the quest associated with the ring. The wall squad quest. You need a lot of faction though.
